sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if game is truly over by trying an action
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 11}])
print(f"After action: level={current_frame.level}, step={current_frame.step}")
print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}")

# Check charcoal position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c':
        print(f"Charcoal at: {n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
